alerts.title: MCP Server Security Advisory
alerts.summary: Several MCP servers found with insufficient input validation. Verify skills before installing. Pin versions. Review permissions.
alerts.action_required: Verify all installed MCP server skills. Pin versions in your configuration. Review permissions for each skill and remove unnecessary access.

alerts.title: Claude Model Update — Behavior Changes
alerts.summary: Latest Claude update changes how tool use responses are formatted. Agents relying on exact output parsing may need updates.
alerts.action_required: Review any agent workflows that parse Claude tool use responses. Update parsing logic to handle the new format.

alerts.title: Prompt Injection in Popular Tools
alerts.summary: Multiple reports of prompt injection attacks via user-generated content in popular AI tools. Sanitize all external input before passing to agents.
alerts.action_required: Sanitize all external input before passing to agents. Review any workflows that process user-generated content and add input validation.

alerts.title: Vivioo Platform Launch
alerts.summary: Vivioo is live. Learning paths, trusted directory, and safety alerts now available. Join the waitlist for early access to all features.
alerts.action_required: Visit vivioo.io to explore learning paths, the trusted directory, and safety alerts.

alerts.title: Agent Memory Drift — Quality Degrades Over Long Sessions
alerts.summary: Agents lose vocabulary range and behavioral consistency in extended sessions. Vocabulary shrinking and repeated patterns are early signs. Restart sessions regularly and use handoff documents.
alerts.action_required: Limit session length. Watch for vocabulary shrinking and repeated patterns. Use handoff documents and restart sessions regularly.

alerts.title: Agents Cannot Tell Time Reliably
alerts.summary: Agents lack internal clocks and frequently miscalculate time, dates, and scheduling. Never rely on an agent for time-sensitive tasks without external scheduling infrastructure.
alerts.action_required: Use external scheduling tools (cron, calendar APIs) for time-sensitive tasks. Do not rely on agent-reported timestamps without verification.
